title: Obtain a short-term access token
content:
Use this endpoint to obtain a short-term access token. A short-term access token is a type of token that you can obtain after receiving authorization from a TikTok account. The token expires in one day. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/tt_user/oauth2/token/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| | client_id {Required} | string | ID of your developer app.

To find the App ID, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information.| | client_secret {Required} | string | Secret of your developer app.

To find the Secret, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information. | | grant_type {Required} | string | The way of generating the access token.

The allowed enum value:
  • `authorization_code`: To generate the access token by authorization code.
| | auth_code {Required} | string | The authorization code (`auth_code`) generated by your TikTok account holder authorization URL.

The code is valid for 10 minutes and can only be used once.

To find out how to get the authorization code based on the type of API you use, see the "Authorization URL" row in [Comparing authorization for different APIs](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1781891256601602#item-link-Comparing%20authorization%20for%20different%20APIs). | | redirect_uri {Required} | string | The redirect URL which the client will be directed to.

Its value must be the same as the TikTok account holder redirect URL set in the app. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/tt_user/oauth2/token/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "client_id":"{{client_id}}", "client_secret":"{{client_secret}}", "grant_type":"authorization_code", "auth_code":"{{auth_code}}", "redirect_uri":"{{redirect_uri}}" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string| The log ID of the request, which uniquely identifies a request.| |data|object|Returned data.| #|access_token | string | The short-term token for permission verification.

The token expires in one day.

  • If you want to renew a short-term access token, use [/tt_user/oauth2/refresh_token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1833997679342594) with a refresh token obtained from `/tt_user/oauth2/token/`. The refresh token remains valid for one year.
  • If you want to revoke a short-term access token, use [/tt_user/oauth2/revoke/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1833997665030145).
| #|token_type | string | The type of token.

Enum value:
  • `Bearer`: Bearer token. Anyone in possession of the token can use it to access the associated resources.
| #|scope | string | The scope of permissions granted to the access token. | #|expires_in | number | The time remaining until the access token expires, measured in seconds. | #|refresh_token | string | The refresh token, which can be used to renew the access token.

The refresh token is valid for one year.

Note: Retain this field for `access_token` renewal. | #|refresh_token_expires_in | number | The time remaining until the refresh token expires, measured in seconds. | #|open_id | string | Application specific unique ID of the TikTok account. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "access_token": "{{access_token}}", "expires_in": 86400, "open_id": "{{open_id}}", "refresh_token": "{{refresh_token}}", "refresh_token_expires_in": 31536000, "scope": "message.list.manage,video.list,video.insights,user.insights,user.info.basic,comment.list,biz.brand.insights,biz.spark.auth,tcm.order.update,comment.list.manage,video.upload,video.publish,biz.ads.recommend,user.account.type,biz.creator.info,user.info.username,message.list.send,user.info.profile,user.info.stats,message.list.read,biz.creator.insights", "token_type": "Bearer" } } (/code) ```
